parsed.production_notes: The video features a real human actor with natural movements, consistent lighting, and realistic textures. There are no AI artifacts like distorted fingers or uncanny facial expressions.

characters.appearance: Young adult male, slim build, dark complexion. He has black hair styled upwards, a beard, and wears round wire-rimmed glasses.
characters.wardrobe: Black t-shirt with a white line-drawing graphic on the chest, dark pants. He wears a watch on his left wrist and a bracelet on his right.

scenes.setting: Living room, daytime. Grey sofa, patterned pillows, black side table with a coffee drink.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A sits on the floor facing the camera. A silver laptop rests on a green patterned cushion on his lap. He gestures with both hands while speaking. Behind him is a grey sofa with a patterned pillow. A black side table with a glass of dark liquid is visible to his left.

scenes.visual_description: Character A addresses the viewer directly, expressing disbelief. Text overlays appear dynamically as he speaks. The setting is a casual living room.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: You're vibe coding but you're still typing your prompts? Bro, that's insane. Watch this.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A looks down at his laptop screen. He speaks while gesturing slightly with his left hand. His right hand rests near the laptop's trackpad. The living room background remains unchanged.

scenes.visual_description: Character A demonstrates dictating to his laptop. An audio waveform graphic and transcribed text appear on screen as he speaks.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: Add a bill splitting feature. No, actually expense splitting feature. Uh, when I log an expense, I can split it with my partner, and um, when one of us marks it paid, it updates for both of us in real time.

scenes.setting: Living room, daytime. Grey sofa, patterned pillows, black side table with a coffee drink.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A looks back up at the camera. He gestures expansively with both hands to emphasize his point. His expression is enthusiastic. The laptop remains on his lap.

scenes.visual_description: Character A explains the benefits of the tool. A UI mockup of the transcribed text appears, followed by logos for Claude and Cursor.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: I just described a full feature in just 8 seconds and no keyboard. Wispr Flow takes everything I say and drops it perfectly formatted in Claude, Cursor, or wherever you're working.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A continues addressing the camera, leaning in slightly. He uses hand gestures to emphasize his final points. The setting and props remain consistent.

scenes.visual_description: Character A delivers the final pitch and call to action. Dynamic text overlays highlight key phrases, ending with the product logo.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: No ums, no fixing. If you're still typing your prompts, you're four times slower than you need to be. Try Wispr Flow for free and thank me later.
